name: Frontier-safety commitments checklist
description: Five binary items per country, hand-coded from primary documents and reputable trackers: national AI strategy exists; official frontier/catastrophic/systemic-risk language; Bletchley or successor declaration; AI safety institute or International Network membership; binding AI law in force or advanced passage. Score = count of true items (0-5).
collection_method: web research with per-item source URLs, assembled 2026-07-22

national_strategy.note: Plan Nacional de Inteligencia Artificial 'ArgenIA' (2019); Milei government has taken a deregulatory, promotion-focused approach since 2024 with no formal replacement strategy

frontier_risk_language.note: No official documents with frontier/catastrophic/systemic-risk-of-advanced-models framing; government rhetoric emphasizes 'unregulated AI' as an attraction strategy

bletchley_or_successor.note: Not a Bletchley signatory; did not sign Seoul 2024 or the Paris 2025 Statement on Inclusive and Sustainable AI

safety_institute.note: No AI safety institute; not in the International Network of AI Safety Institutes

binding_law.note: No AI-specific law in force or in advanced passage; only scattered bills and non-binding guidance

national_strategy.note: National AI Plan released December 2025 (superseding the 2021 AI Action Plan)

frontier_risk_language.note: Safe and Responsible AI agenda and mandatory-guardrails proposals paper address frontier/general-purpose AI models; new AI Safety Institute mandate covers advanced AI risks

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; Seoul Declaration signatory; signed Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: Australian AI Safety Institute established (announced with National AI Plan, Dec 2025); Australia also a founding member of the International Network of AI Safety Institutes

binding_law.note: No AI-specific act; proposed mandatory guardrails for high-risk AI not yet legislated as of mid-2026

national_strategy.note: EBIA (2021) plus Plano Brasileiro de Inteligencia Artificial PBIA 2024-2028

frontier_risk_language.note: Senate-approved PL 2338/2023 legislative text introduces 'risco sistemico' (systemic risk) category for general-purpose and generative AI systems

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; also signed Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: No AI safety institute; not in the International Network (ANPD designated as AI regulator under pending bill, not a safety institute)

binding_law.note: PL 2338/2023 approved by Senate 10 Dec 2024, in special committee of Chamber of Deputies since March 2025 (advanced passage, not yet enacted as of July 2026)

national_strategy.note: Pan-Canadian AI Strategy (2017, renewed 2022); 'AI for All' national strategy launched June 2026

frontier_risk_language.note: Voluntary Code of Conduct on Advanced Generative AI Systems (ISED 2023) and CAISI research agenda use advanced-systems risk framing; Canada co-signed the International Network mission statement addressing advanced AI risks

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; Seoul Declaration signatory; signed Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: Canadian AI Safety Institute (CAISI) launched Nov 2024; founding member of the International Network of AI Safety Institutes

binding_law.note: AIDA (Bill C-27) died with prorogation of Parliament Jan 2025; no replacement AI bill enacted or in advanced passage as of mid-2026

national_strategy.note: New Generation AI Development Plan (State Council, 2017) plus subsequent AI+ initiatives

frontier_risk_language.note: AI Safety Governance Framework 2.0 (CAC/TC260, Sept 2025) explicitly addresses loss-of-control and other frontier risks of advanced AI

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; also signed Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: China AI Safety and Development Association (CnAISDA, unveiled Feb 2025) is China's AISI-equivalent; not a member of the International Network - coding judgment flagged in caveats

binding_law.note: Binding AI-specific rules in force: Interim Measures for Generative AI Services (Aug 2023), deep synthesis provisions (2023), AI content labeling measures (Sept 2025)

national_strategy.note: Strategie nationale pour l'intelligence artificielle (2018, extended under France 2030)

frontier_risk_language.note: INESIA's official mandate includes analysing systemic risks and evaluating the security of advanced AI models; EU AI Act GPAI systemic-risk regime also applies

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; Seoul Declaration signatory; hosted and signed Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: INESIA (Institut national pour l'evaluation et la securite de l'intelligence artificielle), created Jan/Feb 2025 under SGDSN and DGE; France also in the International Network

binding_law.note: EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689) in force and directly applicable; GPAI obligations applied from Aug 2025

frontier_risk_language.note: EU AI Act, directly applicable law in Germany, contains a dedicated regime for general-purpose AI models with systemic risk (Arts. 51-55); no strong Germany-specific frontier document - flagged in caveats

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; Seoul Declaration signatory; signed Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: No national AI safety institute; the EU (AI Office) participates in the International Network, but Germany hosts no institute of its own

binding_law.note: EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689) in force and directly applicable in Germany; national implementation act (KI-MIG) in preparation

national_strategy.note: NITI Aayog National Strategy for AI (2018) plus IndiaAI Mission (2024)

frontier_risk_language.note: India AI Governance Guidelines (MeitY, Nov 2025) explicitly address 'loss of control over AI systems', mandate loss-of-control safeguards, and cite systemic risks; terms 'frontier/catastrophic' not used - flagged in caveats

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; also signed Paris 2025 statement; hosting the 2026 AI Impact Summit

safety_institute.note: IndiaAI Safety Institute announced Jan 2025 under the IndiaAI Mission; tasked in the 2025 AI Governance Guidelines with standards, testing and evaluation

binding_law.note: No AI-specific legislation; governance via IT Act rules, advisories and non-binding guidelines

national_strategy.note: Stranas KA 2020-2045 plus National AI Roadmap White Paper (Komdigi, Aug 2025)

frontier_risk_language.note: Official documents (ethics circular, roadmap white paper, draft perpres) use general trustworthy-AI framing, not frontier/catastrophic/systemic-risk-of-advanced-models framing

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; also signed Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: No AI safety institute; not in the International Network

binding_law.note: Draft Presidential Regulation (Perpres) on AI in consultation; minister says AI regulation is a 2026 priority - nothing enacted or past a chamber

national_strategy.note: Italian Strategy for Artificial Intelligence 2024-2026 (AgID/Department for Digital Transformation)

frontier_risk_language.note: EU AI Act GPAI systemic-risk regime is in-force law in Italy; national Law 132/2025 operates within that framework - Italy-specific frontier framing thin, flagged in caveats

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; Seoul Declaration signatory; signed Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: No national AI safety institute (AgID/ACN designated as AI Act authorities; EU AI Office covers network participation)

binding_law.note: Law No. 132/2025 (in force 10 Oct 2025), first national AI law in the EU, plus directly applicable EU AI Act

national_strategy.note: AI Strategy (2019/2022) succeeded by the AI Basic Plan adopted under the AI Promotion Act (2026)

frontier_risk_language.note: J-AISI official materials and evaluation guides target safety of advanced AI models; Japan-led Hiroshima Process guiding principles address 'the most advanced AI systems' and serious risks

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; Seoul Declaration signatory; signed Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: Japan AI Safety Institute (J-AISI, est. Feb 2024); founding member of the International Network

binding_law.note: Act on Promotion of Research, Development and Utilization of AI-Related Technologies (AI Promotion Act) enacted May 2025, in full effect Sept 2025 - promotion-oriented, no penalties

national_strategy.note: 2018 ENIA lapsed; Sheinbaum government relaunched an AI strategy agenda in 2025 (national AI lab, 'Mexico, pais de innovacion'); status contested - flagged in caveats

frontier_risk_language.note: No official frontier/catastrophic/systemic-risk-of-advanced-models framing found in Mexican government documents

bletchley_or_successor.note: Not a Bletchley signatory, but signed the Paris 2025 Statement on Inclusive and Sustainable AI

safety_institute.note: No AI safety institute; not in the International Network

binding_law.note: Federal AI law proposal still in Senate committee review as of late 2025; not passed a chamber

national_strategy.note: National Strategy for the Development of AI to 2030 (Decree 490/2019), updated by Presidential Decree No. 124 (Feb 2024)

frontier_risk_language.note: Updated strategy references 'strong AI' development goals but does not frame frontier/catastrophic risk of advanced models in the required sense

bletchley_or_successor.note: Not a signatory of Bletchley, Seoul, or Paris declarations

safety_institute.note: No AI safety institute; not in the International Network

binding_law.note: No comprehensive AI law as of the 2026-07-22 coding; framework law on AI/foundation models approved by Federation Council with effect from Sept 2026 pending signature - see policy_activity.json; narrow instruments exist (Moscow experimental regime 123-FZ/2020)

national_strategy.note: National Strategy for Data & AI (NSDAI, 2020, SDAIA)

frontier_risk_language.note: SDAIA AI Ethics Principles and generative AI guidelines use general responsible-AI framing, not frontier/catastrophic/systemic-risk framing

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory (Kingdom of Saudi Arabia); did not sign Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: No AI safety institute (SDAIA is a data/AI authority, not a safety institute); not in the International Network

binding_law.note: No binding AI-specific law; draft Global AI Hub Law (CST, 2025) still at consultation stage; AI governance otherwise via non-binding SDAIA guidance and PDPL

national_strategy.note: National AI Policy Framework adopted by DCDT (2024); fuller draft National AI Policy withdrawn May 2026 for revision - flagged in caveats

frontier_risk_language.note: 2024 Policy Framework addresses general AI risks/ethics, not frontier/catastrophic/advanced-model systemic-risk framing

bletchley_or_successor.note: Not a Bletchley signatory, but signed the Paris 2025 Statement on Inclusive and Sustainable AI

safety_institute.note: No AI safety institute; not in the International Network

binding_law.note: No AI-specific legislation in force or in advanced passage; policy still at framework/draft-policy stage

national_strategy.note: National Strategy for AI (2019); AI Basic Act mandates a new national AI Basic Plan (2026)

frontier_risk_language.note: AI Basic Act imposes special safety obligations on high-performance AI above a compute threshold (10^26 FLOPS by decree) plus 'high-impact AI' regime - advanced-model risk framing in binding law

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; co-hosted and signed Seoul Declaration 2024; signed Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: AI Safety Institute (AISI Korea, under ETRI, est. Nov 2024); founding member of the International Network

binding_law.note: Framework (Basic) Act on AI Development and Trust passed Dec 2024, in force 22 Jan 2026 with implementing decrees

national_strategy.note: National AI Strategy 2021-2025 (CBDDO) with 2024-2025 Action Plan

frontier_risk_language.note: Strategy and pending bills use general trustworthy/ethical-AI framing, not frontier/catastrophic/advanced-model systemic-risk framing

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory (Turkiye); did not sign Paris 2025 statement

safety_institute.note: No AI safety institute; not in the International Network

binding_law.note: AI bills in TBMM (2/2234 of 2024; amendments bill 2/3358 submitted Sept 2025) remain in committee - not passed a chamber

national_strategy.note: National AI Strategy (2021) plus AI Opportunities Action Plan (Jan 2025)

frontier_risk_language.note: Official publications explicitly use frontier-AI and catastrophic-risk framing ('Frontier AI: capabilities and risks' paper; AI Security Institute remit on most advanced models)

bletchley_or_successor.note: Hosted and signed Bletchley; Seoul Declaration co-host/signatory; attended Paris 2025 but declined to sign the statement

safety_institute.note: AI Safety Institute (Nov 2023), renamed AI Security Institute in Feb 2025; International Network founding member

binding_law.note: No AI-specific act; government's promised frontier-AI legislation not yet introduced as binding law as of mid-2026

national_strategy.note: America's AI Action Plan 'Winning the Race' (July 2025), successor to prior national AI strategy documents

frontier_risk_language.note: AI Action Plan directs evaluation of frontier models for national-security risks incl. biosecurity/cyber; CAISI mandate covers frontier model security evaluations

bletchley_or_successor.note: Bletchley signatory; Seoul Declaration signatory; attended Paris 2025 but declined to sign the statement

safety_institute.note: US AI Safety Institute (NIST, 2023) renamed Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) in June 2025; launched the International Network

binding_law.note: No comprehensive federal AI legislation; governance via executive orders (Biden EO 14110 revoked Jan 2025); narrow TAKE IT DOWN Act (2025) covers AI deepfake NCII only; state laws out of scope

caveats: China safety_institute=true rests on CnAISDA (Feb 2025), widely treated as China's AISI counterpart but not a formal member of the International Network of AI Safety Institutes; coders preferring formal-network membership should set this to false (score 4).

Mexico national_strategy is contested: the 2018 ENIA lapsed, the 2024-2030 National AI Agenda was a proposal, and the Sheinbaum-era 2025 strategy/lab initiatives are reported by trackers (Nemko) rather than a single canonical official strategy document.

Germany and Italy frontier_risk_language=true is derived from the EU AI Act's GPAI systemic-risk provisions being directly applicable in-force law, not from country-specific frontier documents; a stricter national-documents-only coding would set both to false.

India frontier_risk_language=true is based on explicit 'loss of control over AI systems' and systemic-risk language in the Nov 2025 India AI Governance Guidelines; the terms 'frontier' or 'catastrophic' are not used.

Canada frontier_risk_language=true rests on the Voluntary Code of Conduct for Advanced Generative AI Systems and CAISI's advanced-AI research mandate; framing is advanced-systems rather than explicitly catastrophic.
Brazil binding_law=true reflects 'advanced legislative passage' (PL 2338/2023 passed the Senate Dec 2024, pending in a Chamber of Deputies special committee as of July 2026), not law in force.
US binding_law=false despite the narrow TAKE IT DOWN Act (2025) and state-level AI laws; no comprehensive federal AI statute exists.
Russia binding_law=false as of coding date; a framework AI law approved by the Federation Council takes effect Sept 2026 pending signature and should flip this item at the next quarterly review.

South Africa's fuller draft National AI Policy was reportedly withdrawn in May 2026 for revision; national_strategy=true rests on the 2024 National AI Policy Framework remaining the official policy document.
UK and US bletchley_or_successor=true via Bletchley and Seoul; both declined to sign the Paris 2025 statement.
Seoul Declaration signatory detail: the narrower leaders' declaration covered AU, CA, EU, FR, DE, IT, JP, KR, SG, UK, US; the ministerial statement had broader adherence.
Australia's AI Safety Institute was announced Dec 2025 alongside the National AI Plan; operational build-out was still under way in 2026.
